topic: A Sanad office in Muscat moved 40 client work permits off WhatsApp — no missed renewals in six months
format: Open with a SmartPro Hub product capability, then show the real-world business outcome it enables
post:
6 months. 40 active work permits. Zero missed renewals — and nobody was hired to make that happen.

No extra headcount. No upgraded spreadsheet.

Just moving every permit out of WhatsApp and into SmartPro Hub's work permit tracking, where deadlines are visible, alerts fire on their own, and nothing expires because someone's phone was off during a long weekend.

Before, this team ran things the way most Sanad offices do: chasing updates across group chats, manually cross-checking dates, hoping nothing slipped over a public holiday. It worked until it didn't.

Six months later — every client permit in one place, status visible without sending a single follow-up message, and a clean record of zero missed renewals.

This is what we built Sanad office management software for. The real risk was never forgetting a date. It was having no system that remembers it for you.

If your permit tracking still lives in a chat thread, that's a liability with a countdown running.

How many active permits is your team carrying right now — and how confident are you that nothing is quietly expiring?

Book a 20-minute demo: https://www.thesmartpro.io/demo?utm_source=linkedin&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=product-proof
